# 1.5 User Domain Objects

## Classes (all new)

| Class | Table | Key Columns |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| `UserDO` | `users` | userId (UUID), displayName, email, state, district, createdAt, updatedAt |
| `UserPreferenceDO` | `user_preferences` | preferenceId (UUID), userId, topic, stance, importance (1-10), embedding (vector), updatedAt |
| `MemberBillStanceDO` | `member_bill_stances` | memberId, billId, voteId, amendmentId (Option[String] — FK to amendments; set when voteType = "Amendment"), position, voteType, voteDate, congress, topics (List[String]) |

## Scoring Infrastructure DOs (all new)

| Class | Table | Key Columns |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| `UserLegislatorPairingDO` | `user_legislator_pairings` | userId (UUID), memberId, state, district (Option[Int]), chamber, pairedAt, validatedAt |
| `MemberBillStanceTopicDO` | `member_bill_stance_topics` | id (UUID), memberId, billId, voteId, topic, stanceDirection (String — "Progressive" / "Conservative" / "Neutral"), reasoning (Option[String]), reasoningEmbedding (Option[Array[Float]] — vector(1536)), findingId (Option[UUID] — FK to bill_findings, proof linkage), confidence (Option[Double] — 0.0-1.0, LLM confidence), conceptSummary (Option[String]), createdAt |
| `UserBillAlignmentDO` | `user_bill_alignments` | userId (UUID), billId, topic, userStanceScore (Double), billStanceDirection (String), alignmentScore (Double 0.0-1.0), reasoning (Option[String]), reasoningEmbedding (Option[Array[Float]] — vector(1536)), findingId (Option[UUID] — FK to bill_findings), computedAt |
| `UserAmendmentAlignmentDO` | `user_amendment_alignments` | userId (UUID), amendmentId, billId (Option[String]), topic, userStanceScore (Double), amendmentStanceDirection (String), alignmentScore (Double 0.0-1.0), reasoning (Option[String]), reasoningEmbedding (Option[Array[Float]] — vector(1536)), findingId (Option[UUID] — FK to amendment_findings), computedAt |
| `StanceMaterializationStatusDO` | `stance_materialization_status` | billId (String PK), hasVotes (Boolean), hasAnalysis (Boolean), allPassesCompleted (Boolean), votesUpdatedAt (Option[Instant]), analysisCompletedAt (Option[Instant]), stancesMaterializedAt (Option[Instant]), lastScoringRunAt (Option[Instant]) |

## Score DOs (all new)

| Class | Table | Key Columns |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| `ScoreDO` | `scores` | userId (UUID), memberId, aggregateScore (Float 0.0-1.0), status (String: "scored", "no_overlap"), lastUpdated, llmModel, totalBills, totalVotes, nonOverlappingTopics (List[String] — PostgreSQL `TEXT[]`), reasoning (Option[String] — LLM explanation of alignment score), reasoningEmbedding (Option[Array[Float]] — vector(1536) embedding for semantic search) |
| `ScoreTopicDO` | `score_topics` | userId, memberId, topic, score (Float 0.0-1.0) |
| `ScoreCongressDO` | `score_congress` | userId, memberId, congress, overallScore (Float 0.0-1.0), billsConsidered, votesAnalyzed |
| `ScoreCongressTopicDO` | `score_congress_topics` | userId, memberId, congress, topic, score (Float 0.0-1.0) |
| `ScoreHistoryDO` | `score_history` | scoreId (UUID), userId, memberId, computedAt, aggregateScore, status (String: "scored", "no_overlap"), triggerEvent, reasoning (Option[String] — LLM explanation at time of compute), reasoningEmbedding (Option[Array[Float]] — vector(1536) embedding for temporal semantic search) |
| `ScoreHistoryCongressDO` | `score_history_congress` | scoreId, congress, overallScore, billsConsidered, votesAnalyzed |
| `ScoreHistoryCongressTopicDO` | `score_history_congress_topics` | scoreId, congress, topic, score |
| `ScoreHistoryHighlightDO` | `score_history_highlights` | scoreId, billId, topic, stance, vote, alignment (Float 0.0-1.0) |

**Schema notes:**
- Migration `002-schema-expansion.sql` adds `reasoning TEXT` to `score_history`.
- Migration `008-score-reasoning.sql` adds `reasoning TEXT` and `reasoning_embedding vector(1536)` to both `scores` and `score_history`. `scores.reasoning` is current (overwritten on re-score); `score_history.reasoning` preserves explanation per point-in-time for trend display. Both `reasoningEmbedding` columns enable semantic search (current on `scores`, temporal on `score_history`). Embeddings generated by `SemanticEmbeddingService` (DJL/ONNX).
- Migration `006-amendment-vote-linkage.sql` adds `amendment_id TEXT REFERENCES amendments(amendment_id)` (nullable) to `member_bill_stances`. Set when `vote_type = 'Amendment'`. Used by stance materializer (§11.9) to look up amendment-specific findings.
- Migration `009-scoring-architecture.sql` adds 5 tables: `user_legislator_pairings`, `member_bill_stance_topics`, `user_bill_alignments`, `user_amendment_alignments`, `stance_materialization_status`. Adds `last_stance_change_at TIMESTAMPTZ` to `users`, `status TEXT` and `non_overlapping_topics TEXT[]` to `scores`, and `status TEXT` to `score_history`.

**Naming convention:** `aggregateScore` (on `ScoreDO`, `ScoreHistoryDO`) = all-time weighted cross-congress. `overallScore` (on `ScoreCongressDO`, `ScoreHistoryCongressDO`) = single congress. Both `Float` in 0.0-1.0.

**`ScoreDO` vs `ScoreHistoryDO`:** Current score (mutable, overwritten on re-score) uses `lastUpdated`, `llmModel`, `reasoning`, `reasoningEmbedding`, counts. History (append-only audit) uses `computedAt`, `triggerEvent`, `reasoning`, `reasoningEmbedding`. Both carry reasoning — current score serves explanation and semantic search without joining; history preserves for trend/temporal search. `ScoreDO` omits `triggerEvent` (history-only metadata).

**Score status field:** Always `"scored"` (≥1 shared topic) or `"no_overlap"` (zero shared topics). When `"no_overlap"`, `aggregateScore` is 0.0 and meaningless; frontend displays "member has not voted on your topics" and suggests survey topics. `nonOverlappingTopics` lists user topics with no legislator votes — frontend uses to prompt additional survey topics. Populated even when `status = "scored"` (partial overlap common).

**`MemberBillStanceTopicDO` — pre-materialized per-topic stances:** Child table of `member_bill_stances`. Stores per-topic stance with LLM reasoning, embedding, and `findingId` FK to `bill_findings` (provenance). Populated by stance materializer (§11.9), consumed by legislator profile builder (§11.2) and user-bill alignment (§11.10).

**`UserBillAlignmentDO` / `UserAmendmentAlignmentDO` — pre-computed alignments:** Per-bill, per-topic alignment between user stance and bill/amendment stance findings. Pre-computed on schedule by §11.10 to avoid redundant work during scoring. Includes LLM reasoning, embedding, and `findingId` for provenance.

## Question Bank DOs (all new — migration 004)

Support pre-tagged question bank for user political stances. Multiple-choice answers → deterministic stance extraction (no LLM). Custom fill-in answers require LLM via `preference-interpretation` profile (Component 9 §9.2).

| Class | Table | Key Columns |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| `QaQuestionDO` | `qa_questions` | questionId (String PK, e.g. "q-healthcare-medicare-expansion"), questionText, category, displayOrder, allowCustom, active, createdAt |
| `QaQuestionTopicDO` | `qa_question_topics` | questionId, topic (composite PK), agreeStance ("Progressive" or "Conservative"), weight (Float, 0.0-1.0 exclusive-inclusive) |
| `QaAnswerOptionDO` | `qa_answer_options` | questionId, optionValue (composite PK, e.g. "strongly_agree"), displayText, stanceMultiplier (Float -1.0 to 1.0), importanceSignal (Int 1-10), displayOrder |
| `QaUserResponseDO` | `qa_user_responses` | responseId (UUID), userId (UUID), questionId, selectedOption (Option[String]), customText (Option[String]), respondedAt |

**Stance extraction logic:** `agreeStance direction × stanceMultiplier × weight`. Example: `agreeStance = "Progressive"`, `stanceMultiplier = 0.6`, `weight = 1.0` → moderately Progressive. Negative multiplier reverses direction. Computed in Component 11 (scoring engine), not DOs.

**Answer type constraint:** Exactly one of `selectedOption` or `customText` must be non-NULL per response (CHECK constraint `chk_answer_type` in migration 004). DO models both as `Option[String]`.

**Question lifecycle:** Soft-delete via `active = false`. Controls onboarding visibility. Existing responses to deactivated questions preserved.

## Acceptance Criteria

**Functional:**
1. `UserDO` fields match `users` table columns. `userId` is `java.util.UUID`.
2. `UserPreferenceDO` fields match `user_preferences`. `importance` is `Int` constrained 1-10.
3. `MemberBillStanceDO` fields match `member_bill_stances`. `topics` is `List[String]` (PostgreSQL `TEXT[]`). `amendmentId` is `Option[String]`.
4. All user, scoring infrastructure, score DOs have Doobie auto-derived `Read`/`Write`.
5. `ScoreDO` fields match `scores`: userId, memberId (composite PK), aggregateScore, status, lastUpdated, llmModel, totalBills, totalVotes, nonOverlappingTopics, reasoning, reasoningEmbedding.
6. `ScoreCongressDO` fields match `score_congress`: userId, memberId, congress (composite PK), overallScore, billsConsidered, votesAnalyzed.
7. `ScoreHistoryDO` includes `reasoning: Option[String]` (migration 002) and `reasoningEmbedding: Option[Array[Float]]` (migration 008) for LLM explanation/embedding. Also `status: String` ("scored" or "no_overlap").
8. `ScoreHistoryCongressDO` fields match `score_history_congress`: scoreId, congress (composite PK), overallScore, billsConsidered, votesAnalyzed.
9. `ScoreHistoryHighlightDO` fields map to `AlignmentScoreOutput.highlights`: billId, topic, stance, vote, alignment.
10. All score `Float` fields constrained 0.0-1.0.
10a. `UserLegislatorPairingDO` fields match `user_legislator_pairings`: userId (UUID), memberId, state, district (Option[Int]), chamber, pairedAt, validatedAt.
10b. `MemberBillStanceTopicDO` fields match `member_bill_stance_topics`: id (UUID PK), memberId, billId, voteId, topic, stanceDirection, reasoning (Option[String]), reasoningEmbedding (Option[Array[Float]]), findingId (Option[UUID]), confidence (Option[Double]), conceptSummary (Option[String]), createdAt.
10c. `UserBillAlignmentDO` fields match `user_bill_alignments`: userId (UUID), billId, topic, userStanceScore, billStanceDirection, alignmentScore, reasoning (Option[String]), reasoningEmbedding (Option[Array[Float]]), findingId (Option[UUID]), computedAt.
10d. `UserAmendmentAlignmentDO` fields match `user_amendment_alignments`: userId (UUID), amendmentId, billId (Option[String]), topic, userStanceScore, amendmentStanceDirection, alignmentScore, reasoning (Option[String]), reasoningEmbedding (Option[Array[Float]]), findingId (Option[UUID]), computedAt.
10e. `StanceMaterializationStatusDO` fields match `stance_materialization_status`: billId (String PK), hasVotes, hasAnalysis, allPassesCompleted, votesUpdatedAt (Option[Instant]), analysisCompletedAt (Option[Instant]), stancesMaterializedAt (Option[Instant]), lastScoringRunAt (Option[Instant]).
10f. `MemberBillStanceTopicDO.stanceDirection` is `String`: "Progressive", "Conservative", "Neutral".
10g. `MemberBillStanceTopicDO.findingId` is `Option[UUID]` FK to `bill_findings` (provenance).
10h. `UserBillAlignmentDO.alignmentScore` and `UserAmendmentAlignmentDO.alignmentScore` are `Double` in 0.0-1.0.
10i. All `reasoningEmbedding` fields are `Option[Array[Float]]` (vector(1536)).
11. `QaQuestionDO` fields match `qa_questions`. `questionId` is `String` (natural key). `allowCustom`, `active` are `Boolean`.
12. `QaQuestionTopicDO` fields match `qa_question_topics`. Composite PK `(questionId, topic)`. `agreeStance` is `String`: "Progressive" or "Conservative". `weight` is `Float`.
13. `QaAnswerOptionDO` fields match `qa_answer_options`. Composite PK `(questionId, optionValue)`. `stanceMultiplier` is `Float` in -1.0 to 1.0. `importanceSignal` is `Int` in 1-10.
14. `QaUserResponseDO` fields match `qa_user_responses`. `responseId` is `UUID`. Both `selectedOption`, `customText` are `Option[String]`.
15. All Q&A DOs have Doobie auto-derived `Read`/`Write`.

**Test Requirements:**
16. Unit test: `UserPreferenceDO` with importance outside 1-10 rejected or database-enforced.
17. Unit test: `MemberBillStanceDO.topics` round-trips through Doobie `TEXT[]`.
18. Codec round-trip test for each user/score DO with Circe (Pub/Sub serialization).
19. Doobie `Read`/`Write` round-trip for all score DOs.
20. `ScoreHistoryDO` with `reasoning = None` and `reasoning = Some("...")` round-trip correctly.
20a. `ScoreDO` with `reasoningEmbedding = None` and `reasoningEmbedding = Some(Array[Float](1536))` round-trip through Doobie.
20b. `ScoreHistoryDO` with `reasoningEmbedding = None` and `reasoningEmbedding = Some(Array[Float](1536))` round-trip through Doobie.
20c. `ScoreDO.reasoningEmbedding` is `None` when `reasoning` is `None` (embedding only when text exists).
21. Codec round-trip test for all Q&A DOs with Circe.
22. Doobie `Read`/`Write` round-trip for all Q&A DOs.
23. `QaUserResponseDO` with `selectedOption = Some("agree"), customText = None` round-trips.
24. `QaUserResponseDO` with `selectedOption = None, customText = Some("I believe...")` round-trips.
25. `QaQuestionTopicDO.weight` stores boundary values (0.01, 0.5, 1.0).
26. Doobie `Read`/`Write` round-trip for `UserLegislatorPairingDO`.
27. Doobie `Read`/`Write` round-trip for `MemberBillStanceTopicDO` with `reasoning = Some("...")` and `reasoning = None`.
28. Doobie `Read`/`Write` round-trip for `MemberBillStanceTopicDO` with `reasoningEmbedding = Some(Array[Float](1536))` and `reasoningEmbedding = None`.
29. Doobie `Read`/`Write` round-trip for `UserBillAlignmentDO` with all optional fields populated.
30. Doobie `Read`/`Write` round-trip for `UserBillAlignmentDO` with all optional fields as `None`.
31. Doobie `Read`/`Write` round-trip for `UserAmendmentAlignmentDO` with `billId = Some("118-HR-1234")` and `billId = None`.
32. Doobie `Read`/`Write` round-trip for `StanceMaterializationStatusDO` with all timestamps `None` (fresh row) and all timestamps populated.
33. Codec round-trip test for all scoring infrastructure DOs with Circe.
34. `MemberBillStanceTopicDO.stanceDirection` accepts "Progressive", "Conservative", "Neutral".
35. `UserBillAlignmentDO.alignmentScore` stores boundary values (0.0, 0.5, 1.0).
36. `StanceMaterializationStatusDO` correctly represents scanner query: `hasVotes = true AND allPassesCompleted = true AND stancesMaterializedAt < analysisCompletedAt`.
